info.name: Draw.io (Deprecated)
info.summary: ⚠️ DEPRECATED — Do not install. This app is no longer maintained.
info.description:
## ⚠️ This app is deprecated and will not receive further updates.
**Do not install this app.** If you are currently using it, please migrate away.
This app is no longer maintained and will not be updated for future Nextcloud releases. Existing installations should export their .drawio files and transition to an alternative solution.
**To migrate:**
1. Your .drawio files are standard draw.io XML files — they can be opened directly at [app.diagrams.net](https://app.diagrams.net) or any draw.io-compatible editor 2. Download your .drawio and .dwb files from Nextcloud 3. Disable and remove the Draw.io app from your Nextcloud instance
**Alternatives:**
- [app.diagrams.net](https://app.diagrams.net) — the official free draw.io web editor - [draw.io Desktop](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop) — offline desktop application for Windows, macOS, and Linux - [Whiteboard](https://apps.nextcloud.com/apps/whiteboard) — Nextcloud's built-in whiteboard app
info.author: draw.io Ltd
